title: Rick's Portal Gun [Fabric/Quilt]
description: Adds Rick's portal gun from Rick and Morty
body:
This is the Fabric version. Forge version [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ricks-portal-gun)

**Requires** [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) AND [**Forge Config API Port**](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)!

This mod adds the portal gun from the popular show Rick and Morty. You can use your portal gun to travel to any location in any dimension. To choose a location to travel to, press V (can be changed) and choose your desired destination!



Special thanks to TheMajorNoob_239 and Gol D. Crow for helping with assets and SamTees for helping out with code.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0wKFDh2WvD0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

 ![Prime Portal Gun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c0a898ee8250854a96c9c7da266dd1b04004a09.png)
 
 ![Golden Portal Gun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0bd14e725b9de7ae426636acbd08b25c01d70c3.png)

 ![Portal Fluid = Bootleg Portal Fluid + Quantum Leap Elixir](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba3f2537fa4c88f40db653a5a6420818ed31f0c9.png)
 
</details>
